title: Tectone YouTube ban leads to Rumble switch, streamer quits Twitch and YouTube
summary_full: Tectone has announced a significant move, leaving both YouTube and Twitch to become an exclusive streamer on Rumble. This decision follows a recent one-week ban from YouTube for "excessive swearing," prompting him to seek a platform with more perceived freedom. His first Rumble stream is scheduled for March 28, though censored videos will still appear on YouTube.
